name: founder-skills
description: Claude Code skills for founders and builders: validate whether a market is real, then decide what to build. From market evidence to a build decision, with cited research and an auditable decision matrix.

plugins.name: founder-suite
plugins.description: Validate a market (market-validation) then decide what to build (build-options). Multi-angle web research with live-URL verification → cited evidence pack + Tufte deck; then an independent judge-panel weighted decision matrix → a recommended build with kill criteria. Chains into the prd → tasks skills.
